info.title: FinancialReports API
info.description:
Public-company filings across G20 markets and Europe. Authenticate every request with the `X-API-Key` header. Honor the `X-RateLimit-Burst-Remaining` response header.

**Tiered access.** **L1** — metadata, company profiles, ISIC classifications, reference data, point-in-time audit trails. **L2** — Markdown / JSON content, full-text search. **L3** — standardized financial line items (income statement, balance sheet, cash-flow statement) per fiscal period, mapped to a single reusable taxonomy.

get.description:
**Access Level Required:** Requires **Standard Access (Level 1)**.

---
Retrieve a paginated list of companies.

parameters.name: countries
parameters.description: Filter by Company country ISO Alpha-2 code(s). Comma-separated for multiple values.

parameters.name: industry
parameters.description: Filter by ISIC Group code.

parameters.name: industry_group
parameters.description: Filter by ISIC Division code.

parameters.name: isin
parameters.description: Filter by Company ISIN. Case-insensitive.

parameters.name: lei
parameters.description: Filter by Company Legal Entity Identifier (LEI). Case-insensitive.

parameters.name: on_watchlist
parameters.description: Filter by companies on the user's watchlist. Use 'true' to see only watchlist companies, 'false' to exclude them. Omitting the parameter returns all companies.

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Which field to use when ordering the results. Available fields: `id`, `name`, `date_ipo`, `year_founded`, `country_iso__name`. Prefix with '-' for descending order (e.g., `-name`).

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search across company name, LEI, ticker symbol, and associated ISIN codes. Case-insensitive. Multiple whitespace-separated terms are AND-combined (each term must match at least one of the searched fields).

parameters.name: sector
parameters.description: Filter by ISIC Section code.

parameters.name: sub_industry
parameters.description: Filter by ISIC Class code.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: Filter by Company primary stock Ticker symbol. Case-insensitive.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Controls the level of detail. Omit for a default 'summary' view, or use 'full' to include all details for each company.

get.description:
**Experimental endpoint — the response schema may change without an API version bump.**

Returns standardized financial KPIs for a company as a structured document: a company envelope containing `periods`, each holding its Income Statement, Balance Sheet and Cash Flow `statements`, each holding `line_items`.

When several filings report the same period, the most recently published filing is selected; every contributing filing is listed in the statement's `sources` array. `source_filing` and `sources` are returned only for accounts with source unmasking enabled (`sources_masked` reports which applies). Use `as_of=YYYY-MM-DD` for a point-in-time view.

Use the `depth` and `parent_code` fields on each line item to render the Capital IQ-style statement hierarchy.

**Access Level Required:** Requires **RAG / Agent (Level 3)**.

parameters.name: as_of
parameters.description: Point-in-time query (`YYYY-MM-DD`). Returns the financials as they were known on that date — only filings released on or before `as_of` are considered when picking the statement for each period.

parameters.name: fiscal_period
parameters.description: Filter by fiscal period.

parameters.name: fiscal_year
parameters.description: Filter by exact fiscal year (e.g. `2024`).

parameters.name: fiscal_year_from
parameters.description: Fiscal year range start (inclusive).

parameters.name: fiscal_year_to
parameters.description: Fiscal year range end (inclusive).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this company.

parameters.name: line_items
parameters.description: Comma-separated KPI codes to include (e.g. `revenue,ebitda,net_income_loss`). Omit to return all extracted line items. Statements with none of the requested codes are dropped. Unknown codes return `400` — see `/api/line-item-definitions/`.

parameters.name: statement_type
parameters.description: Filter to a single statement type.

get.description: Calculates the expected release window for the next annual report based on historical filing patterns.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this company.

200.description: Success. Returns the predicted date window and confidence score.

404.description: Not Found. Not enough historical data to make a confident prediction.

parameters.name: added_to_platform_from
parameters.description: Filter by date added to platform (inclusive start date, YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ format).

parameters.name: added_to_platform_to
parameters.description: Filter by date added to platform (inclusive end date, YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ format).

parameters.name: categories
parameters.description: Filter by multiple Filing Category IDs. Comma-separated (e.g., 1,3).

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by a single Filing Category ID.

parameters.name: company
parameters.description: Filter by internal Company ID.

parameters.name: company_isin
parameters.description: Filter by Company ISIN. Case-insensitive.

parameters.name: countries
parameters.description: Filter by Company country ISO Alpha-2 code(s). Comma-separated for multiple values (e.g., US,GB,DE).

parameters.name: extensions
parameters.description: Filter by file extension(s). Single (e.g., PDF) or comma-separated (e.g., PDF,XBRL). Case-insensitive.

parameters.name: file_size_max
parameters.description: Filter by maximum file size in bytes.

parameters.name: file_size_min
parameters.description: Filter by minimum file size in bytes.

parameters.name: fiscal_period
parameters.description: Filter by fiscal period. Possible values: `FY` (Full Year), `Q1`, `Q2`, `Q3`, `Q4`, `H1` (First Half), `H2` (Second Half). Only populated for filing types: 10-K, 10-K-ESEF, IR, ER.

parameters.name: fiscal_year
parameters.description: Filter by fiscal year (e.g., `2024`). Only populated for filing types: 10-K, 10-K-ESEF, IR, ER.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Filter by a single filing language ISO 639-1 code (e.g., en).

parameters.name: languages
parameters.description: Filter by filing language ISO 639-1 code(s). Comma-separated for multiple values (e.g., en,de).

parameters.name: lei
parameters.description: Filter by Company Legal Entity Identifier (LEI).

parameters.name: on_watchlist
parameters.description: Filter by companies on the user's watchlist. Use 'true' to see only watchlist companies, 'false' to exclude them. Omitting the parameter returns all companies.

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Which field to use when ordering the results. Available fields: `id`, `release_datetime`, `added_to_platform`. Prefix with '-' for descending order (e.g., `-release_datetime`).

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: period_ending_date
parameters.description: Filter by the exact period ending date (YYYY-MM-DD, e.g., `2024-12-31`). Only populated for filing types: 10-K, 10-K-ESEF, IR, ER.

parameters.name: period_ending_date_from
parameters.description: Filter by period ending date — inclusive start (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: period_ending_date_to
parameters.description: Filter by period ending date — inclusive end (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: release_datetime_from
parameters.description: Filter by release datetime (inclusive start, YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ format).

parameters.name: release_datetime_to
parameters.description: Filter by release datetime (inclusive end, YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ format).

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search across filing title and associated company name. Case-insensitive. Multiple whitespace-separated terms are AND-combined (each term must match either the title or the company name).

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Filter by a single data source ID.

parameters.name: sources
parameters.description: Filter by data source ID(s). Comma-separated for multiple values (e.g., 38,40,51).

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by Filing Type code (e.g., 10-K).

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: Filter by multiple Filing Type codes. Comma-separated (e.g., 10-K,10-Q).

parameters.name: updated_date_from
parameters.description: Filter by the date a filing was last updated on the platform (inclusive start, YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ format).

parameters.name: updated_date_to
parameters.description: Filter by the date a filing was last updated on the platform (inclusive end, YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ format).

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Controls the level of detail. Omit for a default 'summary' view, or use 'full' to include all details for each filing.

results.title: Annual Report 2025 (ESEF ZIP)
results.filing_type_reasoning: The document title contains 'Annual Report' and the filing period covers a full fiscal year (FY). The structure includes audited financial statements, a management discussion & analysis section, and a board report — all consistent with a 10-K-ESEF filing type. No quarterly indicators detected.

get.description:
**Access Level Required:** Requires **Processed Filings (Level 2)** access to view full converted content.

---
Retrieve the raw processed content of a single filing in Markdown format.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this filing.

ExampleMarkdown.value:
# ANNUAL REPORT 2023

## OUR MISSION

TO BE THE BEST SPORTS BRAND IN THE WORLD...

value.detail: Your current plan (Level 1) does not permit access. Access to full filing content in Markdown requires a **Level 2** Plan or higher.

403.description: Forbidden. Your plan does not include access to this endpoint.

value.detail: Processed content not found for this filing.

404.description: Not Found. The filing or its processed content does not exist.

get.description:
Retrieve the full dictionary of standardized financial KPIs.

Each definition describes one line item that may appear in extracted financial statements (Income Statement, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow Statement). Use the `depth` and `parent_code` fields to reconstruct the Capital IQ-style hierarchy.

**Access Level Required:** Requires **Standard Access (Level 1)**.

parameters.name: depth
parameters.description: Filter by hierarchy depth (0 = top-level, 1 = component, 2 = sub-component).

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: parent_code
parameters.description: Filter by parent line item code (e.g. 'gross_profit' returns its children).

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: A search term.

parameters.name: statement_type
parameters.description:
Filter by statement type (IS, BS, CFS, SUP).

* `IS` - Income Statement
* `BS` - Balance Sheet
* `CFS` - Cash Flow Statement
* `SUP` - Supplemental / Ratio

get.description:
Retrieve a single line item definition by its code.

**Access Level Required:** Requires **Standard Access (Level 1)**.

company_id: This field may not be blank.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all webhooks configured for your account. Note: Secret keys are not returned in this list.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

post.description: Create a new webhook subscription. The `secret_key` is returned in the response **only once**.

201.description: Webhook created. The `secret_key` is returned only in this response.

get.description: Retrieve the details of a specific webhook by its ID. Note: Secret keys are not visible here.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this webhook.

put.description: Update the details of a specific webhook.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this webhook.

patch.description: Partially update the details of a specific webhook.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this webhook.

delete.description: Permanently delete a webhook subscription by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this webhook.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of delivery attempts (logs) for a specific webhook.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this webhook.

get.description: Retrieve full details for a single delivery, including the reconstructed request payload and headers. The payload is rebuilt dynamically from the referenced filing record.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this webhook.

404.description: Delivery not found for this webhook.

post.description: Re-sends the webhook event for a specific delivery. A new delivery record is created with the result of the replay attempt.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this webhook.

value.message: Replay queued. A new delivery attempt will appear in the logs shortly.

404.description: Delivery not found for this webhook.

post.description: Generates a new, unique `secret_key` for this webhook. The old key will be invalidated immediately. This action is irreversible.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this webhook.

post.description: Sends a pre-defined 'filing.processed.test' event to the configured webhook URL to verify its functionality. This creates a delivery record.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this webhook.

value.message: Test event successfully sent. Endpoint responded with HTTP 200.

200.description: Test event was sent and the endpoint responded successfully.

value.message: Test event failed. Endpoint responded with error status: 404

400.description: Test event failed (e.g., endpoint returned an error, invalid URL).

company_ids.description: A list of company IDs (1–100) to add or remove from the watchlist.

status.description: Indicates the status of the operation (e.g., 'success', 'error').

message.description: A human-readable message describing the outcome.

company_ids.description: The IDs of the companies affected by the action.

tagline.description: A short, one-liner describing the company's value proposition.

description.description: A detailed description or 'About Us' text for the company.

description_last_updated.description: Timestamp of the last update to the company's description.

isins.description: ISINs associated with the company (capped at 100; use the ISIN endpoint for the full list).

isin_count.description: Total number of ISINs associated with this company.

country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the company's primary registration or headquarters.

city.description: The city where the company's headquarters is located.

zip_code.description: The postal or ZIP code for the company's address.

ir_link.description: Link to the company's Investor Relations page.

homepage_link.description: Link to the company's main homepage.

logo.description: URL of the company's logo file.

date_public.description: Date this company record was last updated on the FinancialReports platform. This is NOT the IPO date — see `date_ipo` instead.

date_ipo.description: Date of the company's Initial Public Offering (IPO). Returns null when the IPO date is unknown.

main_stock_exchange.description: Primary stock exchange where the company is listed.

is_listed.description: Indicates if the company is currently publicly listed.

corporate_video_id.description: Identifier for a corporate video (e.g., YouTube ID).

served_area.description: Geographical area served by the company.

local_company_id.description: Local registration or jurisdiction-specific ID (e.g., HRB 24902, CIK 123456).

shares_outstanding.description: The total number of a corporation's stock shares that have been authorized and issued.

designated_sponsor.description: Financial institutions that act as market makers for the company's stock.

listed_stock_exchange.description: A list of stock exchanges where the company is listed.

stock_index.description: A list of stock indices the company is a component of.

legal_status.description: The operational and legal registration status sourced from GLEIF (e.g., ACTIVE, INACTIVE).

legal_form.description: The ISO 20275 Entity Legal Form sourced from GLEIF.

jurisdiction.description: The legal jurisdiction of incorporation sourced from GLEIF.

legal_address.description: The official registered legal address of the company sourced from GLEIF.

legal_city.description: The city of the registered legal address sourced from GLEIF.

legal_zip_code.description: The postal code of the registered legal address sourced from GLEIF.

tagline.description: A short, one-liner describing the company's value proposition.

isins.description: Primary ISIN(s) for the company. Use the company detail endpoint for the full list.

sub_industry_code.description: ISIC classification code classifying the company.

country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the company's primary registration or headquarters.

name.description: Human-readable name of the legal form.

detail.description: A human-readable message describing the error.

filing_date.description: The official date of the filing (soon to be deprecated).

added_to_platform.description: Date and time when the filing was added to our platform

updated_date.description: The date and time this filing record was last modified.

dissemination_datetime.description: Time the document was released to the public and sent to the authority

release_datetime.description: Time the document was published on the authority page

document.description: Direct URL to the raw filing package (e.g., ZIP/PDF) on S3.

proxy_url.description: Direct URL to the extracted, browser-renderable main document.

viewer_url.description: URL to view the filing in the interactive web platform.

file_size.description: File size in bytes. Stores locally to avoid storage backend hits.

filing_type_confidence.description: Confidence score (0.0–1.0) assigned by the automated classification system for the filing type.

filing_type_reasoning.description: Step-by-step rationale produced by the automated classification system for the assigned filing type. Indicative only — not manually reviewed.

fiscal_year.description: The accounting fiscal year this filing covers (e.g., 2024). Populated for annual, quarterly, interim reports and earnings releases. Null if not yet determined.

fiscal_period.description:
The specific fiscal period covered by this filing. Possible values: FY (Full Year), Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4, H1 (First Half), H2 (Second Half). Populated for annual, quarterly, interim reports and earnings releases. Null if not yet determined.

* `FY` - Full Year
* `Q1` - First Quarter
* `Q2` - Second Quarter
* `Q3` - Third Quarter
* `Q4` - Fourth Quarter
* `H1` - First Half
* `H2` - Second Half
* `9M` - Nine Months

period_ending_date.description: The exact date the reported financial period ends (e.g., 2024-12-31). Populated for annual, quarterly, interim reports and earnings releases. Null if not yet determined.

history_date.description: The exact date and time the change was recorded.

event_type.description: The name of the event (e.g., 'filing.processed' or 'filing.received').

webhook_id.description: The ID of the webhook configuration that triggered this event.

filing_id.description: The ID of the newly processed filing.

company.description: Details of the company associated with the filing.

triggered_at.description: The timestamp (ISO 8601) when the event was triggered.

release_datetime.description: Time the document was published on the authority page

document_url.description: Direct URL to the raw filing package (e.g., ZIP/PDF) on S3.

proxy_url.description: Direct URL to the extracted, browser-renderable main document.

viewer_url.description: URL to view the filing in the interactive web platform.

processing_status.description:
The lifecycle status of the raw document to markdown conversion.

* `PENDING` - Pending
* `QUEUED` - Queued
* `PROCESSING` - Processing
* `COMPLETED` - Completed
* `FAILED` - Failed
* `SKIPPED` - Skipped

file_size.description: File size in bytes. Stores locally to avoid storage backend hits.

code.description: Unique code identifying the filing type.

name.description: Human-readable name of the filing type.

description.description: Detailed description of the filing type.

category.description: The broad functional category (Disclosure Type) this report belongs to.

FiscalPeriodEnum.description:
* `FY` - Full Year
* `Q1` - First Quarter
* `Q2` - Second Quarter
* `Q3` - Third Quarter
* `Q4` - Fourth Quarter
* `H1` - First Half
* `H2` - Second Half
* `9M` - Nine Months

is_primary.description: Indicates if this is the primary ISIN for the company on this platform.

company.description: The company associated with this ISIN.

figi.description: The 12-character Financial Instrument Global Identifier (FIGI) for this specific listing.

composite_figi.description: The composite FIGI representing the instrument across all exchanges in a given country.

share_class_figi.description: The share class FIGI representing the instrument globally, regardless of exchange.

security_type.description: Primary security type classification (e.g., Common Stock, ETP, REIT).

security_type2.description: Secondary security type classification providing additional granularity.

market_sector.description: Market sector classification from OpenFIGI (e.g., Equity, Govt, Corp).

exch_code.description: Exchange code where this security is listed (e.g., GY, US, LN).

figi_last_updated.description: Timestamp of the last successful FIGI data enrichment for this ISIN.

code.description: ISO 3166-1 or ISO 3166-2 jurisdiction code (e.g., GB, US-DE).
Stable machine code, e.g. 'revenue', 'total_assets'. Never rename in place — deprecate and add a new code.

depth.description: Hierarchy depth: 0 = top-level total/heading, 1 = component of a parent, 2 = sub-component.

parent_code.description: Code of the parent line item in the hierarchy, or null for top-level items.

category.description: Optional grouping within a statement (e.g. 'Operating Expenses').

description.description: Definition of the KPI. Used in the extraction prompt.

aliases.description: Alternative labels this line item may appear under in source filings.

is_capital_iq_standard.description: True if this KPI maps 1:1 to an S&P Capital IQ field.

start_date.description: The earliest expected date for the report release.

end_date.description: The latest expected date for the report release.

confidence.description: Confidence score (0-100) based on historical consistency.

is_overdue.description: True if the current date is past the predicted window.

id.description: The unique identifier for the webhook.

url.description: The endpoint URL (HTTPS required) to which the webhook payloads will be sent.

is_active.description: Set to 'false' to temporarily disable this webhook without deleting it.

include_markdown.description: Set to 'true' to include the full 'markdown_content' in the webhook payload. Set to 'false' to receive a payload without the markdown body.

include_isins.description: Set to 'true' to include the list of ISINs in the company object. Warning: Large companies may have thousands of ISINs, increasing payload size.

track_all_companies.description: Set to 'true' to subscribe to the Global Firehose. You will receive notifications for filings from ALL companies in the database, regardless of your Watchlist.

trigger_on_filing_received.description: If true, triggers immediately when a filing is detected (Fastest). Note: Metadata like filing type may be null, and no markdown is included.

trigger_on_filing_processed.description: If true, triggers when the filing has been fully analyzed and converted (Complete). Includes verified metadata and markdown content.

subscribed_filing_types.description: A list of filing type codes (e.g., ['10-K', 'Annual Report']) to subscribe to. If this list is empty or omitted, you will be subscribed to all filing types.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the webhook was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the webhook was last updated.

ProcessingStatusEnum.description:
* `PENDING` - Pending
* `QUEUED` - Queued
* `PROCESSING` - Processing
* `COMPLETED` - Completed
* `FAILED` - Failed
* `SKIPPED` - Skipped

name.description: Generic label identifying the regional authority for this data source.

url.description: Homepage URL for the data source, when available.

StatementTypeEnum.description:
* `IS` - Income Statement
* `BS` - Balance Sheet
* `CFS` - Cash Flow Statement
* `SUP` - Supplemental / Ratio

company_id.description: The unique identifier of the company to add or remove from the watchlist.

id.description: The unique identifier of the company.

WatchlistPage.description:
Paginated watchlist envelope: the standard GlobalCustomPagination
fields plus the `is_locked` flag the watchlist view appends to the page.

count.description: Total number of companies on the watchlist.

next.description: URL of the next page of results, or null on the last page.

previous.description: URL of the previous page of results, or null on the first page.

is_locked.description: Whether the watchlist is locked by an administrator.

status.description: Indicates the status of the operation (e.g., 'success', 'error').

message.description: A human-readable message describing the outcome.

company_id.description: The ID of the company related to the action, if applicable.

id.description: The unique identifier for the webhook.

url.description: The endpoint URL (HTTPS required) to which the webhook payloads will be sent.

is_active.description: Set to 'false' to temporarily disable this webhook without deleting it.

include_markdown.description: Set to 'true' to include the full 'markdown_content' in the webhook payload. Set to 'false' to receive a payload without the markdown body.

include_isins.description: Set to 'true' to include the list of ISINs in the company object. Warning: Large companies may have thousands of ISINs, increasing payload size.

track_all_companies.description: Set to 'true' to subscribe to the Global Firehose. You will receive notifications for filings from ALL companies in the database, regardless of your Watchlist.

trigger_on_filing_received.description: If true, triggers immediately when a filing is detected (Fastest). Note: Metadata like filing type may be null, and no markdown is included.

trigger_on_filing_processed.description: If true, triggers when the filing has been fully analyzed and converted (Complete). Includes verified metadata and markdown content.

subscribed_filing_types.description: A list of filing type codes (e.g., ['10-K', 'Annual Report']) to subscribe to. If this list is empty or omitted, you will be subscribed to all filing types.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the webhook was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the webhook was last updated.

company_page.description: URL to the company's page on Financial Reports.

country_name.description: Name of the company's country of incorporation.

isins.description: List of ISIN codes (strings) associated with the company. The Primary ISIN is always at index 0. Only included if your webhook is configured with 'include_isins: true'.

WebhookCreateResponse.description:
Response body for `create()` — identical to WebhookSerializer plus the
one-time `secret_key`, which the view injects into the create response.

id.description: The unique identifier for the webhook.

url.description: The endpoint URL (HTTPS required) to which the webhook payloads will be sent.

is_active.description: Set to 'false' to temporarily disable this webhook without deleting it.

include_markdown.description: Set to 'true' to include the full 'markdown_content' in the webhook payload. Set to 'false' to receive a payload without the markdown body.

include_isins.description: Set to 'true' to include the list of ISINs in the company object. Warning: Large companies may have thousands of ISINs, increasing payload size.

track_all_companies.description: Set to 'true' to subscribe to the Global Firehose. You will receive notifications for filings from ALL companies in the database, regardless of your Watchlist.

trigger_on_filing_received.description: If true, triggers immediately when a filing is detected (Fastest). Note: Metadata like filing type may be null, and no markdown is included.

trigger_on_filing_processed.description: If true, triggers when the filing has been fully analyzed and converted (Complete). Includes verified metadata and markdown content.

subscribed_filing_types.description: A list of filing type codes (e.g., ['10-K', 'Annual Report']) to subscribe to. If this list is empty or omitted, you will be subscribed to all filing types.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the webhook was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the webhook was last updated.

secret_key.description: The webhook signing secret. Returned only once, in the create response.

filing_id.description: ID of the filing reference to reconstruct payload
ID of the filing reference to reconstruct payload

request_headers.description: Reconstructed request headers that were sent with this delivery.

request_payload.description: Reconstructed request payload. Built dynamically from the referenced filing.

processing_status.description: The current processing status of the filing (e.g., 'PENDING', 'COMPLETED').

filing_type_code.description: Short code for the filing type (e.g., '10-K'). May be null for 'filing.received' events.

filing_type_name.description: Human-readable filing type (e.g., 'Annual Report'). May be null for 'filing.received' events.

language_code.description: ISO 639-1 language code (e.g., 'en'). May be null for 'filing.received' events.

language_name.description: Human-readable language name (e.g., 'English'). May be null for 'filing.received' events.

dissemination_datetime.description: The exact time the filing was disseminated by the source.

release_datetime.description: The official release time of the filing (e.g., the period end).

document_url.description: A direct, temporary link to download the original filing document (e.g., PDF).

markdown_content.description: The full, processed content of the filing in Markdown format. This field is only included if your webhook is configured with 'include_markdown: true' AND the event type is 'filing.processed'. It is null for 'filing.received'.

message.description: Human-readable description of the replay outcome.

secret_key.description: The unique secret key for the webhook. This is shown only once.

WebhookTestResponse.description: Result of POST .../test/ — same shape on success (200) and failure (400).

status.description: Delivery status of the test event (e.g. 'success', 'failed').

message.description: Human-readable description of the test outcome.

delivery_uuid.description: UUID of the delivery record created for this test.

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Server-to-server API key authentication. Provide your key in the `X-API-Key` request header. Keys can be generated and rotated from your account dashboard at https://financialreports.eu/profile/.

CognitoJWT.description: AWS Cognito-issued JWT access token. Provide the token in the `Authorization` header as: `Authorization: Bearer <access_token>`. Tokens are issued via the Cognito hosted UI or the OAuth2 authorization code flow at `https://auth.financialreports.eu`.

post.description: Triggered when a filing has been successfully analyzed, classified, and converted to Markdown. This event contains the complete metadata and content.
Triggered immediately when a filing is ingested. Metadata (Filing Type, Language) and Markdown content may be null at this stage.
